title: vitex velutina
intro: Vitex velutina, also known as the Korean mast tree or Korean vitex, is a type of tree native to East Asia, specifically in China, Japan, and Korea. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vitex velutina include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Vitex velutina include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
